excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Microelectronics and Integrated Circuits lists 3rd round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-03-16. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 1st round: 24 November 2025 (Mon) 2nd round: 12 January 2026 (Mon) 3rd round: 16 March 2026 (Mon) 4th round: 27 April 2026 (Mon)
